code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Initialized: Customer starts process
    
    Initialized --> ProductSelected: Select products/services
    ProductSelected --> SelfDeclared: Complete regulatory forms
    
    SelfDeclared --> BasicDataCollected: Provide contact information
    BasicDataCollected --> ExtendedDataCollected: Risk assessment data
    
    ExtendedDataCollected --> PendingIdentification: Start identity verification
    
    state PendingIdentification {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> VideoIdent
        [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> EID_Integration  
        [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> BiometricVerification
        VideoIdent --> IdentityVerified
        EID_Integration --> IdentityVerified
        BiometricVerification --> IdentityVerified
    }
    
    IdentityVerified --> KYC_Processing: Background checks
    
    state KYC_Processing {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> PEP_Check
        [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Sanctions_Check
        [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> AML_Assessment
        PEP_Check --> KYC_Complete
        Sanctions_Check --> KYC_Complete
        AML_Assessment --> KYC_Complete
    }
    
    KYC_Complete --> ContractAccepted: Customer accepts terms
    ContractAccepted --> PendingSignature: Prepare signature
    
    state PendingSignature {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> QES_Signature
        [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> TwoFA_Signature
        [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Biometric_Signature
        QES_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        TwoFA_Signature --> DocumentSigned
        Biometric_Signature --> DocumentSigned
    }
    
    DocumentSigned --> AccountActivated: Process metadata & distribution
    AccountActivated --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: Customer onboarded
    
    %% Error states
    ProductSelected --> Failed: Eligibility check failed
    BasicDataCollected --> Failed: Data validation error
    ExtendedDataCollected --> Failed: Risk assessment failed
    PendingIdentification --> Failed: Identity verification failed
    KYC_Processing --> Failed: KYC checks failed
    PendingSignature --> Failed: Signature process failed
    
    Failed --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Process terminated
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个工业物联网场景下的客户开户流程状态图。核心是从MQTT Broker触发，经过一系列KYC流程，最终到达PLC Logic完成 onboarding。
明白，这个流程会涉及身份验证和合规检查。我注意到您提到了三个工业物联网组件：MQTT Broker作为入口，那EdgeNode、TelemetryStream和ActuatorController这些会用在哪些环节？
好问题。PendingIdentification这个复合状态里，我们需要三种验证方式并行：VideoIdent走EdgeNode通道，EID_Integration走TelemetryStream，BiometricVerification走ActuatorController。
已添加PendingIdentification复合状态，内部三个并行验证路径都汇聚到IdentityVerified。接下来KYC_Processing部分，您希望怎么分配这三个工业组件？
KYC_Processing里，PEP_Check用ActuatorController，Sanctions_Check和AML_Assessment都走MQTT Broker，这两个检查可以共享同一个消息通道。
确认：PEP_Check ← ActuatorController，Sanctions_Check和AML_Assessment ← MQTT Broker，三者汇聚到KYC_Complete。然后进入ContractAccepted状态对吗？
对，ContractAccepted之后是PendingSignature，这里需要设计三种电子签名方式。
PendingSignature的三种签名方式，工业组件怎么映射？TelemetryStream、EdgeNode、MQTT Broker分别对应哪种签名？
QES_Signature用TelemetryStream传输 qualified 签名数据，TwoFA_Signature走EdgeNode做双因素验证，Biometric_Signature回MQTT Broker做生物特征比对。
PendingSignature复合状态已完成，三种签名路径都汇聚到DocumentSigned。之后是AccountActivated，最后到PLC Logic结束流程。
还需要考虑异常流程。ProductSelected、BasicDataCollected、ExtendedDataCollected这些阶段都可能失败，要统一汇聚到Failed状态。
收到。PendingIdentification、KYC_Processing、PendingSignature这些复合状态内部如果出错，也要能进入Failed吗？
是的，这三个复合状态都要有失败出口。Failed最终要回到MQTT Broker，表示流程终止，释放资源。

已添加所有错误路径：ProductSelected→Failed（资质检查失败）、BasicDataCollected→Failed（数据验证错误）、ExtendedDataCollected→Failed（风险评估失败）、PendingIdentification→Failed（身份验证失败）、KYC_Processing→Failed（KYC检查失败）、PendingSignature→Failed（签名流程失败）。Failed→MQTT Broker。
主线流程再确认一下：Initialized前面是MQTT Broker触发，标注为"Customer starts process"，然后ProductSelected、SelfDeclared、BasicDataCollected、ExtendedDataCollected这条链路对吗？

确认主线：MQTT Broker触发Initialized（Customer starts process）→ProductSelected（Select products/services）→SelfDeclared（Complete regulatory forms）→BasicDataCollected（Provide contact information）→ExtendedDataCollected（Risk assessment data）→PendingIdentification。
ExtendedDataCollected到PendingIdentification的迁移标注改为"Start identity verification"，这样语义更清晰。
已更新。IdentityVerified之后的迁移标注为"Background checks"，KYC_Complete到ContractAccepted是标准流转。AccountActivated到PLC Logic标注为"Customer onboarded"。
AccountActivated的描述再精确一点，应该是"Process metadata & distribution"，包含元数据处理和账户分发。
已更新AccountActivated的迁移标注。现在完整流程已绘制完成，从MQTT Broker启动，经过多级验证和KYC，最终到PLC Logic结束，所有异常路径都收敛回MQTT Broker。
检查一遍复合状态的边界：PendingIdentification包含三个验证子状态，KYC_Processing包含三个检查子状态，PendingSignature包含三个签名子状态，结构对称，符合工业物联网的分层架构设计。
确认无误。三个复合状态均采用并行结构，内部子状态通过不同工业组件（EdgeNode/TelemetryStream/ActuatorController/MQTT Broker）实现，最终分别汇聚到IdentityVerified、KYC_Complete、DocumentSigned。状态图已完成。
